\u2014 on-chain enforcement of the intergenerational        fairness corridor (EquiGen).","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"The economic question (\u201cwhat are the cohort EPVs?\u201d) is answered         off-chain by the Python engine (`engine.ledger.cohort_valuation`).         This contract is just the execution gate: it stores the last         accepted baseline and evaluates any proposed new EPV vector         against the pairwise corridor rule             max_{i,j} |\u0394EPV_i \u2212 \u0394EPV_j| / benchmark \u2264 \u03b4         where \u0394EPV_c = new_c \u2212 baseline_c and benchmark is the mean of         |baseline|. EPVs are passed in 1e18 fixed-point.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/FairnessGate.sol":"FairnessGate"},"evmVersion":"paris","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/FairnessGate.sol":{"keccak256":"0x37809a7a6ebd016285a251262cb79d96ce0f1d20ec7909d55edcc3a036afcc6a","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://a9093dc5faaecccc9f173d8b386fbfb5b70b8be978045b33b25cca3ef0f9e0f2","dweb:/ipfs/QmTyjVo4hyumJg6qhJU9rJczfeCTfqXBu8cCAycWzNdxWE"]},"src/interfaces/IFairnessGate.sol":{"keccak256":"0x1717331323e4fd9d682e0f8eeb40bd45b00874d712321cc3c58fae279f3cad51","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://9ac5b399d2ca04bca6c5093cf021a12911acc11f1b497c0c93af0e6997e8d914","dweb:/ipfs/QmaRuP7E27ygUsoTdshZyZFSqDeZEnpSoxM93BYiyfMy7i"]},"src/utils/Owned.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2109ff61a043c0743eb8655c47b684c453657be35a41b4f35944156463678d48","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8be6ddcfcca1103fb7d748b68086d54946e6a087da2c2d758d5297192b968f0b","dweb:/ipfs/Qme1HdBF1vT81ntD8PNT9dgy5JAQmSAKmvgjUufyr9YKf7"]},"src/utils/Roles.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2aa94822867486267b9c09f71bbd7f53111c0f1a764a9c55f19cd0b37c26d0ba","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://16a78e21e63a0ebee01d538d28dc66ef559876ac90c5dee1a246b3bddf538dd1","dweb:/ipfs/QmZeDnV5W1q1dXCG8fmG5ahDatfNW9bjNiP48D32etv9ux"]}},"version":1}
